recipe.title: Chicken garden soup
recipe.description: A chicken soup recipe is a real staple, and this one uses roast chicken, so it’s a great way to use up any leftovers. A beautiful, hearty, winter soup recipe.

ingredients.name: a few sprigs of fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps.descr: For this recipe, you will need 1 higher-welfare roast...
steps.instructions: For this recipe, you will need 1 higher-welfare roast chicken carcass, with leftover chicken attached.

on_enter.say: For this recipe, you will need 1 higher-welfare roast chicken carcass, with leftover chicken attached.

steps.descr: Peel and roughly chop the onions, roughly chop 2 carrots...
steps.instructions: Peel and roughly chop the onions, roughly chop 2 carrots and celery sticks, then place them in a large pan with the bay leaves, peppercorns, a pinch of sea salt and the chicken carcass.

on_enter.say: Peel and roughly chop the onions, roughly chop 2 carrots and celery sticks, then place them in a large pan with the bay leaves, peppercorns, a pinch of sea salt and the chicken carcass.

steps.descr: Fill the pan with cold water so that everything is...
steps.instructions: Fill the pan with cold water so that everything is covered, then place on a high heat and bring to the boil. Reduce to a simmer and cook for 1 hour, skimming off any scum that rises to the surface from time to time.

on_enter.say: Fill the pan with cold water so that everything is covered, then place on a high heat and bring to the boil. Reduce to a simmer and cook for 1 hour, skimming off any scum that rises to the surface from time to time.

steps.descr: About 20 minutes before the stock is ready, crack on...
steps.instructions: About 20 minutes before the stock is ready, crack on with the base of the soup: peel the remaining carrots and slice ½cm thick with the remaining celery. Peel and finely slice the garlic and shallots. Pick the parsley leaves, finely chopping the leaves and stalks. Roughly shred the spinach.

on_enter.say: About 20 minutes before the stock is ready, crack on with the base of the soup: peel the remaining carrots and slice ½cm thick with the remaining celery. Peel and finely slice the garlic and shallots. Pick the parsley leaves, finely chopping the leaves and stalks. Roughly shred the spinach.

steps.descr: Place the butter and 1 tablespoon of oil in another...
steps.instructions: Place the butter and 1 tablespoon of oil in another large pan on a low heat, add the garlic, shallots and parsley stalks and cook for 5 to 10 minutes, or until softened.

on_enter.say: Place the butter and 1 tablespoon of oil in another large pan on a low heat, add the garlic, shallots and parsley stalks and cook for 5 to 10 minutes, or until softened.

steps.descr: Add the carrots and celery and cook for a further 5 minutes
steps.instructions: Add the carrots and celery and cook for a further 5 minutes.

on_enter.say: Add the carrots and celery and cook for a further 5 minutes.

steps.descr: When the stock is ready, remove the chicken carcass,...
steps.instructions: When the stock is ready, remove the chicken carcass, pull off any remaining pieces of meat and leave to one side, then discard the carcass.

on_enter.say: When the stock is ready, remove the chicken carcass, pull off any remaining pieces of meat and leave to one side, then discard the carcass.

steps.descr: Strain the stock through a sieve into the veg pan
steps.instructions: Strain the stock through a sieve into the veg pan. Bring to the boil, then reduce to low and simmer for 20 minutes.

on_enter.say: Strain the stock through a sieve into the veg pan. Bring to the boil, then reduce to low and simmer for 20 minutes.

steps.descr: Add the seasonal greens and cook for a further 10...
steps.instructions: Add the seasonal greens and cook for a further 10 minutes, adding the spinach for the last minute.

on_enter.say: Add the seasonal greens and cook for a further 10 minutes, adding the spinach for the last minute.

steps.descr: Finish the soup by squeezing in the lemon juice, then...
steps.instructions: Finish the soup by squeezing in the lemon juice, then taste and season to perfection, if needed.

on_enter.say: Finish the soup by squeezing in the lemon juice, then taste and season to perfection, if needed.

steps.descr: Divide between bowls and top with any leftover shredded...
steps.instructions: Divide between bowls and top with any leftover shredded chicken, a sprinkling of parsley leaves and a good hit of black pepper.

on_enter.say: Divide between bowls and top with any leftover shredded chicken, a sprinkling of parsley leaves and a good hit of black pepper.
